gpu.torch_cuda: PyTorch CUDA hmanga siam a ni

settings.gpu_none: GPU provider hmuhchhuah a ni lo
settings.lufs_target_hint: Exporting lak hunah starting suggestion atan hman thin. Suno default hi -14 LUFS vel a ni.
settings.saved: Preferences te chu save a ni

guide.title: Suno recording kaihhruaina
guide.subtitle: Voice leh guitar lak dan capture dan chuan result tha ber a hmu thin.
guide.intro: Suno hian reference thianghlim leh chiang lo tak tak hmangin a ti tha ber. He kaihhruaina hian inbuatsaihna, target level leh minute 3–5 chhunga recording script a huam a ni.

prep.title: Inbuatsaihna
prep.body: Treated room emaw, soft material tamna (curtain, rug, thawmhnaw closet-a dah) emaw-ah record rawh. Fans leh eng thil pawh hum off rawh. Recording hmain minute 5 chhung i aw kha warm up rawh.

levels.title: Levels: -12 atanga -6 dBFS thleng a ni
levels.body: Meter-a -12 leh -6 dBFS inkar peak awm tum ang che. Chu range hnuaiah chuan background noise chu a langsar zual sauh a; a chungah chuan clipping risk a sang chho hle. Record page-a meter hmangin i gain chu i start hmain set hmasa phawt ang che.

distance.title: Mic hlat zawng: 15–30 cm
distance.body: Microphone atanga cm 15 atanga 30 vel a hlaah awm rawh. Chu aia hnai zawk chuan plosives leh proximity effect a tizual a; hla zawkah chuan room reverb leh noise a pick up tam zawk.

script.title: Recording script a ni
script.vowels: Vowel nghet tak — a, e, i, o, u
script.scales: Scale awlsam tak, chunglam leh hnuai lam
script.dynamics: Dynamics: bul tan nêm, tawp ringawt
script.spoken_phrase: Spoken phrase pakhat, chutiang chuan Suno chuan i vocal tone a chhiar thei ang

expectations.title: Suno beisei chu
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, dry (reverb leh effects nei lo), minute 3 atanga 5 chhung reference a ni. Minute 2 chhunga thianghlim ber, aiawh ber berte hian result tha ber a chhuah tlangpui.

status.quase: Chutah chuan a awm tawh mai

suno_voice_full.name: Suno tan vocal script kimchang tak a awm
suno_voice_full.desc: 5 guided minutes: warm-up, vowel, scale, hla thumal pahnih, dynamics, leh thusawi thumal pakhat.

step.warmup_inst: Yawns, lip trills (brrr), leh soft hum hmangin minute khat vel losen up rawh. Record a ngai lo — hla sak hmaa i rilru tih hahdamna tur chauh a ni.
step.vowels_inst: Vowel tin — a, e, i, o, u — chu i aw nuam takah second 3 atanga 4 chhung vawng la, volume mumal tak nen. Hei hian Suno chu i aw timbre thianghlim tak chu a pick up theih nan a pui a ni.
step.scales_inst: Scale awlsam tak, chunglam leh hnuai lam, "la" emaw "na" emaw-ah hla sa rawh. A famkim a ngai lo — tum ber chu i vocal range map siam hi a ni.
step.section_inst: Hla hi bar 8 atanga 16 vel sa la, i sawi tum tak tak nen. Technical perfection aiin chiang zawk leh awmna hi dah pawimawh zawk rawh.
step.section2_inst: Bar 8 atanga 16 dang hla sak leh rawh — a tha ber chu chorus emaw, a hmaa mi nena inthlau section emaw a ni. Variety tam zawk hian model chu i aw a zir theih nan a pui thin.
step.dynamics: Dynamics: a nem → a ri nasa hle
step.dynamics_inst: Thumal inang chu nêm tak aṭanga ṭan la, aw ring taka tawp la, i rilru ti na lovin hla sa rawh. Hei hian Suno i aw dynamic range a entir a ni.
step.spoken_inst: Thusawi rawh — hla sa suh — thumal tawi, pianpui, inbiak ang maiin. Hei hian Suno chu i aw timbre tak tak a hriat theih nan a pui a ni.

stages.fade: Fade in / fade out a ni
stages.stereo_to_mono: Mono ah a let leh ang

tier.2: A tlangpuiin hna a thawk thin
